name: Carousel
description: Slide-based content rotator with autoplay and keyboard nav.

api.name: Carousel
api.description: Slide-based content rotator with autoplay and keyboard nav.

parameters.name: Autoplay
parameters.description: Advance slides automatically on a timer. Pairs well with Loop so the deck wraps instead of stopping at the end.

parameters.name: AutoplayInterval
parameters.description: Autoplay tick interval in milliseconds. Defaults to 4000.

parameters.name: PauseOnHover
parameters.description: Pause autoplay while the pointer is over the carousel or focus is inside it (so users can read / interact). Defaults to true.

parameters.name: ShowIndicators
parameters.description: Render clickable indicator dots (one per slide) below the deck.

records.name: CarouselContext
records.signature:
CarouselContext(
        string ContentId,
        Lumeo.Orientation Orientation,
        bool CanScrollPrev,
        bool CanScrollNext,
        EventCallback ScrollPrev,
        EventCallback ScrollNext,
        Action<object> RegisterItem,
        Action<object> UnregisterItem
    )

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
@for (var i = 1; i <= 5; i++) { var index = i;
@index
}

examples.title: With Loop
examples.code:
@for (var i = 1; i <= 5; i++) { var index = i;
@index
}

examples.title: Orientation — interactive
examples.code: @for (var i = 1; i <= 4; i++) { var index = i; @index } @code { private string _orientationSel = "Horizontal"; private List _orientationOptions = new() { new() { Label = "Horizontal", Value = "Horizontal" }, new() { Label = "Vertical", Value = "Vertical" }, }; }

examples.title: Product Gallery
examples.code:
@foreach (var product in _products) {
@product.Category
 @product.Name @product.Price
}

mdSummary:
# Carousel

Slide-based content rotator with autoplay and keyboard nav.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/carousel

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Carousel | ScopedDirection | `LayoutDirection?` | `` |  |
| Carousel | Orientation | `Lumeo.Orientation` | `Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal` |  |
| Carousel | Loop | `bool` | `` |  |
| Carousel | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Carousel | Autoplay | `bool` | `` | Advance slides automatically on a timer. Pairs well with Loop so the deck wraps instead of stopping at the end. |
| Carousel | AutoplayInterval | `int` | `4000` | Autoplay tick interval in milliseconds. Defaults to 4000. |
| Carousel | PauseOnHover | `bool` | `true` | Pause autoplay while the pointer is over the carousel or focus is inside it (so users can read / interact). Defaults to true. |
| Carousel | ShowIndicators | `bool` | `` | Render clickable indicator dots (one per slide) below the deck. |
| Carousel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Carousel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Carousel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CarouselContent | Context | `Carousel.CarouselContext` | `default!` |  |
| CarouselContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CarouselContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CarouselContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | Context | `Carousel.CarouselContext` | `default!` |  |
| CarouselItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | Index | `int?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | Total | `int?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CarouselNext | Context | `Carousel.CarouselContext` | `default!` |  |
| CarouselNext | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CarouselNext | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CarouselPrevious | Context | `Carousel.CarouselContext` | `default!` |  |
| CarouselPrevious | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CarouselPrevious | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Carousel) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CarouselContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CarouselItem) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `CarouselContent`, `CarouselItem`, `CarouselNext`, `CarouselPrevious`

## Cascading values it expects
- `ScopedDirection` (`LayoutDirection?`)
- `Context` (`Carousel.CarouselContext`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ThemeService` ()

## Keyboard
- `ArrowUp` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowUp in Carousel.razor
- `ArrowDown` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowDown in Carousel.razor

## Example
```razor
<Carousel />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Carousel/Carousel.razor`
- `UI/Carousel/CarouselContent.razor`
- `UI/Carousel/CarouselItem.razor`
- `UI/Carousel/CarouselNext.razor`
- `UI/Carousel/CarouselPrevious.razor`
